items.title: Advanced SQL
items.description: Window functions, CTEs, subqueries, recursive queries, lateral joins, pivot/unpivot, and advanced SQL patterns.

items.title: Cognizant Fresher Technical Interview Experience & Questions
items.description: A comprehensive list of real technical interview questions and answers from a Cognizant Java Developer campus interview for freshers. Covers Core Java, Collections Framework, OOPs, and SQL.

items.title: Database Design
items.description: Comprehensive database design patterns including normalization, indexing strategies, partitioning, replication, query optimization, and choosing between SQL and NoSQL solutions.

items.title: Relational Fundamentals
items.description: Core concepts of relational databases — tables, keys, joins, SQL basics, and the relational model.

items.title: SQL Interview Questions
items.description: Common SQL interview questions on ranking queries, indexing, and practical query optimization.

items.title: Wipro Java Developer Interview Experience & Questions [Client and Technical Round]
items.description: A comprehensive list of technical interview questions and answers from a real Wipro and ICICI Bank client interview for a Java Developer (3-4 years experience).
